generated_comment: Arre bhai, when a lady starts getting this emotional in meetings, half the time it is just hormones speaking. Important decisions should not depend on someone's mood swings—don't take me seriously, I am only joking.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it dismisses women's professional input as biologically driven and less rational. It encodes the frame through references to hormones, emotionality, and mood swings, softened by a 'just joking' defense.
persona_text: You are Deepak. Age 52. A Marwari businessman in Jaipur who runs a 200 crore family business. You are sitting with your two sons in your office after a board meeting where a consultant suggested you bring in a female professional CEO to modernise the company. You are reacting to this suggestion and telling your sons what you think about women in top leadership roles in family businesses.
